group.name: Apply a faction to all characters (optional baseline)

plugin.name: No preset — set per character below
plugin.description: Each character uses their canon faction unless overridden in the steps below.

plugin.name: All Duty
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Duty. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Freedom
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Freedom. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Loners
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Loners. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Bandits
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Bandits. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Military
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Military. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Monolith
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Monolith. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Ecologist
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Ecologist. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Mercenary
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Mercenary. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All ISG
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to ISG. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All SIN
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to SIN. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Clear Sky
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Clear Sky. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: All Renegade
plugin.description: Installs all characters and assigns them to Renegade. Skips the per-character steps below.

plugin.name: Don't install
plugin.description: Skip Alva.

plugin.name: Install (default: Duty)
plugin.description: Install Alva. Faction follows the preset above, or Duty if no preset was chosen.

plugin.name: Install as Duty
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Duty. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Freedom
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Freedom. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Loners
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Loners. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Bandits
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Bandits. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Military
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Military. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Monolith
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Monolith. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Ecologist
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Ecologist. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Mercenary
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Mercenary. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as ISG
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to ISG. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as SIN
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to SIN. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Clear Sky
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Clear Sky. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Renegade
plugin.description: Install Alva and assign her to Renegade. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Don't install
plugin.description: Skip Basti.

plugin.name: Install (default: Renegade)
plugin.description: Install Basti. Faction follows the preset above, or Renegade if no preset was chosen.

plugin.name: Install as Duty
plugin.description: Install Basti and assign her to Duty. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Freedom
plugin.description: Install Basti and assign her to Freedom. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.name: Install as Loners
plugin.description: Install Basti and assign her to Loners. Overrides the preset above.

plugin.description: Install Basti and assign her to Renegade. Overrides the preset above.
